settings.title: Akash Kumar Prajapati | Senior Mobile App Developer
settings.description: Portfolio of Akash Kumar Prajapati — Software Engineer specializing in Flutter & React Native. Builds scalable, high-performance mobile apps for Android & iOS.

hero.name: Akash Kumar
hero.tagline: building production-grade apps for Android & iOS — shipped worldwide

reviews.name: Rahul Sharma
reviews.text: Akash delivered an exceptional e-commerce app. His Flutter expertise is outstanding!

reviews.name: Priya Patel
reviews.text: Built our healthcare booking app with WebRTC — works flawlessly.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.text: Architected our food delivery platform. Real-time tracking is incredibly smooth.

paragraphs: I am a detail-oriented Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable mobile applications using Flutter and React Native.
I specialize in cross-platform mobile apps, Firebase backend systems, REST API integration, payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay), App Store & Play Store deployment, and performance optimization.
I believe in writing clean, scalable, and production-ready code that delivers real business value. Every project I take on is an opportunity to solve meaningful problems through technology.

highlights.title: Cross-platform Apps
highlights.desc: Flutter & React Native expert — one codebase, two platforms.

highlights.title: Firebase Backend
highlights.desc: Real-time databases, authentication, cloud functions, and push notifications.

highlights.title: Clean Architecture
highlights.desc: Production-ready scalable code with BLoC, Riverpod & Redux.

achievements.text: Published 15+ apps on Play Store & App Store
Delivered all projects on time & within budget

description: Developed and deployed high-performing, cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and React Native.
Collaborated with product managers and UX/UI designers to translate requirements into technical specifications.
Integrated APIs for real-time data sync, secure payment gateways, and advanced functionalities.
Employed state management (Provider, Bloc, Redux) for scalable and maintainable architectures.
Published apps on Google Play Store and Apple App Store following platform guidelines.
Built cutting-edge React Native apps, leveraging React and JavaScript for optimal performance.
Guided cross-functional teams through complex React Native projects meeting tight deadlines.
Integrated third-party APIs including payment gateways and social media platforms.
Led code reviews and proactively addressed bugs and performance bottlenecks.
Built web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js.
Developed backend services with Node.js and Express.js.
Used Git and GitHub for version control and collaboration.

projects.title: Pearlies
projects.description: Healthcare research app developed for NUS Dentistry faculty, focused on early childhood dental care intervention for parents. Features educational content, appointment reminders, and dental health tracking for children.
projects.role: Built the complete healthcare research app for NUS Dentistry, implementing educational content delivery and parent engagement features.

projects.title: Boskalis BOSS
projects.description: Enterprise mobile solution built for Boskalis, a Netherlands-based dredging and logistics company. Streamlines operations with real-time project tracking, fleet management, and crew coordination tools.
projects.role: Developed the enterprise mobile solution for Boskalis, focusing on operational efficiency and real-time data synchronization.

projects.title: Kimi UAE
projects.description: Food ordering app built for the UAE market, designed for a cafe and restaurant ordering experience. Features menu browsing, cart management, order tracking, table reservations, and loyalty rewards.
projects.role: Built the complete food ordering app for the UAE market with menu management, cart functionality, and order tracking.

projects.title: Atesplore
projects.description: Customer-facing marketplace app for the Atesplore ecosystem. Offers seamless product discovery, real-time order tracking, secure payments, and personalized recommendations for shoppers.
projects.role: Developed the customer-facing marketplace app with product browsing, cart, checkout, and order management.

projects.title: Atesplore Merchant
projects.description: Merchant-facing companion app for the Atesplore marketplace ecosystem. Enables merchants to manage inventory, process orders, track sales analytics, and communicate with customers.
projects.role: Built the merchant companion app for inventory management, order processing, and sales analytics.

projects.title: DreamShop India
projects.description: Feature-packed e-marketplace offering rewards, surprise discount coupons, and an engaging shopping experience for Indian consumers with seamless payments and order tracking.
projects.role: Developed the e-marketplace app with reward system, discount coupons, and engaging shopping experience for Indian consumers.

projects.title: SalesPulse
projects.description: Sales operations app to streamline placing new orders, tracking order status, and managing payments in real time. Empowers sales teams with instant data access and customer management.
projects.role: Built the sales operations app for order placement, real-time tracking, and payment management.

projects.title: Bajaj MIS
projects.description: Reporting app for cane crushing data at Bajaj Hindustan Ltd sugar mills. Provides real-time insights into production metrics, inventory levels, and operational efficiency across mills.
projects.role: Developed the reporting app for Bajaj Hindustan Ltd sugar mills for cane crushing data monitoring and analysis.

projects.title: Dalmia MIS
projects.description: App used by farmers and salesmen to track cane position in factory, powered by Dalmia Sugar. Offers crop management insights, queue status, and real-time updates on cane processing.
projects.role: Built the app for farmers and salesmen to track cane position in factory for Dalmia Sugar.

projects.title: Wave MIS
projects.description: App used by farmers and salesmen to track cane position in factory, powered by Wave Industries Mills Ltd. Delivers actionable data on cane supply, queue position, and processing status.
projects.role: Developed the app for farmers and salesmen to track cane position in factory for Wave Industries.

projects.title: UK Cane MIS
projects.description: Reporting app for cane crushing data at UK Cane Society. Enables efficient tracking of cane procurement, crushing statistics, payment management, and operational reporting.
projects.role: Built the reporting app for cane crushing data management for UK Cane Society.

testimonials.name: Rahul Sharma
testimonials.quote: Akash delivered an exceptional e-commerce app for our platform. His expertise in Flutter and Firebase is outstanding.

testimonials.name: Priya Patel
testimonials.quote: Working with Akash was a fantastic experience. He built our healthcare booking app with complex WebRTC integration.

testimonials.name: Vikram Singh
testimonials.quote: Akash has incredible technical depth. He architected our entire food delivery platform.

testimonials.name: Ananya Gupta
testimonials.quote: Akash's work on our fintech app was phenomenal. The charts and data visualization are beautiful.

testimonials.name: Sneha Reddy
testimonials.quote: Akash led the mobile development for our fitness app with great skill. The HealthKit integration is seamless.
